title: SystemVerilog: Fix typedef struct in global space

features.name: global_typedef_struct_packed_member_access
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed defined at global scope (outside module/package), used as a module port type, with struct member accessed via dot notation inside the module body.

features.name: global_typedef_struct_packed_as_module_io
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct (packed or unpacked) defined at global scope, used as input or output port type of a module that references it.
